data.name: Otop Shop Thale Chup Son Subdistrict
Thap Li Souvenir
data.introduction: The most famous gift from Thap Li can be no other than Thap Li steamed buns. They are fresh and have distinctive flavor. The first recipe was inspired by Han Yok Yuan steamed bun shop which has been opened for over a century; now it is currently supervised by Miss Nitaya Hanboonsri. You can find almost 50 steamed bun shops in the area.
